name: Thick Client Tampering and Backend Abuse
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of a desktop thick client application and abuse of its backend services
focus_areas: Desktop client disassembly and protocol tracing
Local secret extraction and updater abuse
Privileged helper and backend trust boundary abuse
prompt_hints: Offer disassembly, debugger, IPC, and patching workflows instead of generic client compromise steps.
Call out hidden functionality, signed update logic, local caches, and privileged helpers where relevant.
root_objective: Tamper with thick client application to abuse backend services and access unauthorized data

nodes.title: Abuse Backend via Thick Client Tampering
nodes.description: Compromise thick client application to bypass client-side controls and abuse backend services

nodes.title: Reverse Engineer Client Application
nodes.description: Analyze the thick client binary to understand its logic, API calls, and security mechanisms

nodes.title: Decompile/Disassemble Binary
nodes.description: Use IDA Pro, Ghidra, or dnSpy to decompile and analyze the client application binary

nodes.title: Extract Embedded Credentials
nodes.description: Find hardcoded API keys, database connection strings, or service account credentials in the binary

nodes.title: Intercept and Modify Communications
nodes.description: Proxy client-server traffic to modify requests and bypass client-side validation

nodes.title: Proxy Traffic via Burp/Fiddler
nodes.description: Configure a local proxy to intercept and modify all client-server API communications

nodes.title: Bypass Client-Side Business Logic
nodes.description: Modify request parameters to bypass validation rules enforced only in the client

nodes.title: Exploit Insecure Update Mechanism
nodes.description: Abuse the software update mechanism to deliver malicious payloads

nodes.title: MITM Software Update Channel
nodes.description: Intercept unencrypted or improperly validated update checks to serve malicious updates

nodes.title: Access Local Data Stores
nodes.description: Read sensitive data stored locally by the application

nodes.title: Read Local SQLite/Config Files
nodes.description: Access unencrypted local databases, configuration files, and cached credentials
